data.title: Meridian Energy Updates Leadership Shareholdings with New Disclosure Notices
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Meridian Energy Limited ( (MDDNF) ).

Meridian Energy Limited announced ongoing disclosure notices for several directors and senior managers, highlighting minor typographical corrections in previous documents. The release indicates a transaction involving the acquisition of ordinary shares by CEO Neal Anthony Barclay through an employee share scheme, reflecting the company’s commitment to involve its leadership in its equity structure.

More about Meridian Energy Limited

Meridian Energy Limited is a New Zealand-based company that operates in the renewable energy industry. It primarily focuses on the generation and retailing of electricity, with a strong market presence in New Zealand and Australia.

data.title: RocketDNA Ltd Issues Over 30 Million Shares Following Placement Approval
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Delta Drone International Ltd ( (AU:RKT) ).

RocketDNA Ltd, listed on the ASX under the ticker RKT, has issued 30,769,230 ordinary shares at an issue price of $0.013 per share. This share issuance follows a previously announced placement and was approved in a general meeting held on 12 December 2024. The shares were issued without disclosure under Part 6D.2 of the Corporations Act, and the company confirms compliance with relevant provisions of the Act, ensuring no excluded information exists that would affect investor decision-making.

An announcement from Ambertech Limited ( (AU:AMO) ) is now available.

Ambertech Limited has announced that it will release its financial results for the half-year ending December 31, 2024, on February 25, 2025. The company will also host a webinar on the same day to discuss these results, providing stakeholders an opportunity to engage with the management. This announcement highlights Ambertech’s transparency and dedication to keeping investors informed about its financial performance.

data.title: Santos Limited Director Increases Stake, Reflecting Confidence in Company Prospects
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Santos Limited ( (AU:STO) ) has shared an announcement.

Santos Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, with Vickki McFadden, a director and shareholder of Tallis Pty Limited, increasing her indirect interest in the company by acquiring 24,000 ordinary shares. This move, executed through an on-market purchase at an average price of AU $6.58 per share, raises her total holding to 50,000 shares. This acquisition reflects confidence in the company’s prospects and may positively influence stakeholder perceptions, highlighting the director’s commitment to the company’s growth.

More about Santos Limited

Santos Limited is a significant player in the energy sector, primarily involved in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas. The company focuses on supplying energy needs across Australia and Asia, positioning itself as a key provider in the regional market.

data.title: Renegade Exploration Highlights Mongoose Deposit at RIU Conference
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Renegade Exploration Limited ( (AU:RNX) ) is now available.

Renegade Exploration Limited presented at the RIU Explorers Conference, highlighting the Mongoose Deposit’s inferred resources, although its in-ground valuation does not comply with the JORC Code and should not be used for investment decisions. This presentation reflects the company’s ongoing exploration and development efforts, potentially impacting its market positioning by showcasing resource potential despite valuation caveats.

More about Renegade Exploration Limited

Renegade Exploration Limited is an Australian-based minerals exploration and development company with key assets in Queensland, Australia, and Canada’s Yukon Province. The company’s flagship project, the Cloncurry Copper Project, is situated in the North West Minerals Province of Queensland, known for its rich mineral resources. Renegade is actively involved in drilling and exploration activities here and is expanding its interests with a significant stake in the North Isa Project nearby. In Canada, the Yukon Base Metal Project holds substantial mineral resources, including zinc, lead, and other critical metals.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$8.99M

data.title: Delta Corp Announces Strategic Merger with Head Digital Works
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Delta Corp. Ltd. (India) ( (IN:DELTACORP) ).

Delta Corp Ltd. and its subsidiary Deltatech Gaming Limited (DGL) have entered into an agreement with Head Digital Works, where Head Digital will initially acquire 51% of DGL’s shareholding. This transaction will lead to a merger of DGL with Head Digital, resulting in Delta Corp acquiring a 5.7% stake in Head Digital. The transaction is subject to shareholder approval and aims to consolidate Delta Corp’s presence in the online gaming industry, potentially enhancing its market position and offering strategic benefits to stakeholders.

More about Delta Corp. Ltd. (India)

Delta Corp Ltd. (India) operates in the gaming and hospitality industry, focusing on online and offline gaming services. Its primary products include casino operations and online gaming platforms, positioning itself as a key player in the Indian gaming sector.

data.title: Matsa Resources Initiates Trading Halt for Major Announcement
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Matsa Resources Limited ( (AU:MAT) ) just unveiled an update.

Matsa Resources Limited has requested a trading halt on its securities pending an important announcement regarding a material corporate transaction. This transaction involves the disposal of the Company’s Lake Care Gold Project, indicating a significant shift in its operational strategy. The halt will last until the announcement is made or until normal trading resumes on 25 February 2025, highlighting potential implications for stakeholders concerning the company’s future market positioning.

More about Matsa Resources Limited

Matsa Resources Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on the exploration and development of gold projects. It holds various mining assets and is engaged in activities that aim to expand its presence in the gold mining market.

data.title: TESS Holdings Expands Biomass Production in Indonesia
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from TESS Holdings Co., Ltd. ( (JP:5074) ) is now available.

TESS Holdings Co., Ltd. announced the groundbreaking of an EFB pellet manufacturing plant at Sei Mangkei Industrial Park, Indonesia, through its subsidiary PT PTEC RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT. This move aims to address the underutilization of EFB, a byproduct of the palm oil industry, by converting it into biomass fuel, enhancing sustainable practices and reducing environmental impacts. The plant, set to commence operations in 2026, will produce 10,000 tons of pellets annually for the Indonesian and Japanese markets, leveraging local partnerships and infrastructure to optimize production and supply chains.

More about TESS Holdings Co., Ltd.

TESS Holdings Co., Ltd., based in Osaka, Japan, operates in the biomass energy sector, focusing on converting agricultural crop residues, such as EFB from the palm oil industry, into biomass pellets. The company is expanding its market focus on sustainable energy solutions, particularly in Indonesia and Japan.

Average Trading Volume: 502,698

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen19.72B

See more insights into 5074 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
